query:
INSERT INTO quality_standards (departmentCode, name, code, description, category, metricType, minimumValue, targetValue, excellentValue, standardTierMinimum, premiumTierMinimum, eliteTierMinimum, weight) VALUES
-- Deliverable Quality Standards
('DESIGN', 'Design Quality Score', 'DESIGN_QUALITY', 'Overall quality rating for design deliverables', 'deliverable_quality', 'percentage', 70.00, 85.00, 95.00, 70.00, 85.00, 95.00, 3),
('MEDIA', 'Media Production Quality', 'MEDIA_QUALITY', 'Quality rating for media production deliverables', 'deliverable_quality', 'percentage', 70.00, 85.00, 95.00, 70.00, 85.00, 95.00, 3),
('TAX_PREP', 'Tax Document Accuracy', 'TAX_ACCURACY', 'Accuracy rate for tax preparation documents', 'deliverable_quality', 'percentage', 95.00, 98.00, 99.50, 95.00, 98.00, 99.50, 5),
('FINANCE', 'Financial Report Accuracy', 'FIN_ACCURACY', 'Accuracy rate for financial reports', 'deliverable_quality', 'percentage', 95.00, 98.00, 99.50, 95.00, 98.00, 99.50, 5),

-- Timeliness Standards
('DESIGN', 'Design On-Time Delivery', 'DESIGN_ONTIME', 'Percentage of design projects delivered on time', 'timeliness', 'percentage', 80.00, 90.00, 98.00, 80.00, 90.00, 98.00, 2),
('MEDIA', 'Media On-Time Delivery', 'MEDIA_ONTIME', 'Percentage of media projects delivered on time', 'timeliness', 'percentage', 80.00, 90.00, 98.00, 80.00, 90.00, 98.00, 2),
('TAX_PREP', 'Tax Filing Timeliness', 'TAX_ONTIME', 'Percentage of tax filings completed before deadline', 'timeliness', 'percentage', 95.00, 99.00, 100.00, 95.00, 99.00, 100.00, 4),

-- Communication Standards
(NULL, 'Client Response Time', 'RESPONSE_TIME', 'Average response time to client inquiries (hours)', 'communication', 'score', 24.00, 8.00, 2.00, 24.00, 8.00, 2.00, 2),
(NULL, 'Client Satisfaction Score', 'CLIENT_SAT', 'Average client satisfaction rating', 'communication', 'rating', 3.50, 4.20, 4.80, 3.50, 4.20, 4.80, 3),

-- Documentation Standards
(NULL, 'Documentation Completeness', 'DOC_COMPLETE', 'Percentage of projects with complete documentation', 'documentation', 'percentage', 80.00, 95.00, 100.00, 80.00, 95.00, 100.00, 2),

-- Compliance Standards
('TAX_PREP', 'Tax Compliance Rate', 'TAX_COMPLIANCE', 'Percentage of filings passing compliance review', 'compliance', 'percentage', 98.00, 99.50, 100.00, 98.00, 99.50, 100.00, 5),
('FINANCE', 'Financial Compliance Rate', 'FIN_COMPLIANCE', 'Percentage of reports meeting regulatory standards', 'compliance', 'percentage', 98.00, 99.50, 100.00, 98.00, 99.50, 100.00, 5),

-- Innovation Standards
('DESIGN', 'Design Innovation Score', 'DESIGN_INNOV', 'Rating for creative and innovative solutions', 'innovation', 'rating', 3.00, 4.00, 4.80, 3.00, 4.00, 4.80, 2),
('MEDIA', 'Media Innovation Score', 'MEDIA_INNOV', 'Rating for creative and innovative media content', 'innovation', 'rating', 3.00, 4.00, 4.80, 3.00, 4.00, 4.80, 2);
